title: E-commerce Pipeline Recovery
description: Restore and harden a broken daily orders pipeline from Postgres into ClickHouse.

tasks.description: Create analytics.fct_orders_daily in ClickHouse with daily revenue and order counts.
Ensure duplicate order events do not inflate daily totals.
Make reruns idempotent without duplicating rows.

infrastructure.description: Postgres seeded with orders including a known duplicate (ord_002). ClickHouse running but empty.
